title: real acid mod
description: this mod adds acid but not like retextured lava it gives you wither and its green
body: If you want acid in Minecraft but haven't found a good mod, I was in the same predicament, so I made this mod. There are two simple things included: a block/fluid and a bucket of that fluid. The recipe is simple: just place a poisonous potato in a brewing stand, then add a bucket and start brewing.
